name: Select 2
description: Dual gated precision CV processor. Per channel: 2-input selector, low-droop track-and-hold, and gated polariser. Switches, mutes, holds, inverts, attenuates, offsets, mixes and subtracts CV or audio.

controls.name: Polariser Knob
controls.description: Attenuverter at the end of each signal chain. Min = inverted, centre = zero, max = unity.

inputs.name: SIG. INPUTS (left)
inputs.description: Default signal input for the channel. Processed by hold and polariser.

inputs.name: SIG. INPUTS (right)
inputs.description: Alternate signal input, routed when SELECT gate is high.

inputs.name: HOLD
inputs.description: Rising edge freezes current input voltage. Holds accurately for several minutes (low-droop design).

inputs.name: SELECT
inputs.description: Low = left signal input routed. High = right signal input routed.

inputs.name: UNITY
inputs.description: High disables the polariser (forces unity gain through). Low enables polariser knob.

outputs.name: A OUT
outputs.description: Channel A processor output. If left unpatched, signal is mixed into B OUT.

outputs.name: B OUT
outputs.description: Channel B processor output. Sums in A's signal when A OUT is unpatched.

behaviors.name: Constant voltage generator
behaviors.description: Left SIG IN normalises to +5V reference. Polariser knob then outputs a manual −5V to +5V CV. Adds a precision offset source to any rack.

behaviors.name: Gated attenuverter / muter
behaviors.trigger: signal on left IN + gate on SELECT
behaviors.description: High SELECT switches to right IN (normalised 0V), muting the signal. Low SELECT routes the processed audio/CV. Unity gate disables the attenuverter.

behaviors.name: Low-droop track-and-hold
behaviors.description: While HOLD is high the output holds the captured voltage. Leakage low enough to store pitch-accurate CV for minutes. Works on audio too (sample-and-hold at audio rate).

behaviors.name: A→B mix summing
behaviors.description: A processor's signal automatically mixes into B OUT via the dashed normalisation. Enables attenuverter+offset in a single channel pair and −10V to +10V generation.

behaviors.name: Schmitt-trigger gate inputs
behaviors.trigger: weak or slow modulation into gate jacks
behaviors.description: HOLD, SELECT and UNITY all use +2V/+3V Schmitt thresholds. Slow LFOs, audio sine waves or bipolar signals reliably clock the digital features without buffering.

behaviors.name: Gate-to-audio converter
behaviors.description: Polariser at min, gate into UNITY, all other inputs unused: output becomes a 10Vpp square wave (−5V to +5V), non-inverted from the source gate.

patchIdeas.name: Manual 10V offset
patchIdeas.patch: All jacks empty · A polariser sweeps −5V to +5V from the +5V ref · B polariser does the same, summed via A→B normal · together generate −10V to +10V offsets with no cables
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: taste
* B Polariser: taste

- Select 2 (B OUT) >> VCO (FM) // A normalises into B OUT for ±10V range

patchIdeas.name: CV sequence selector
patchIdeas.patch: Sequence 1 → left IN · sequence 2 → right IN · gate pattern → SELECT (same clock) · low picks sequence 1, high picks sequence 2 · quickly generate hybrid melodies from two sources
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: max

- Sequencer 1 (Pitch) p> Select 2.A (SIG left)
- Sequencer 2 (Pitch) p> Select 2.A (SIG right)
- Gate Seq (Out) g> Select 2.A (SELECT)
- Select 2 (A OUT) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Pitch memory with clock
patchIdeas.patch: S&H-style pitch latch: melody CV → left IN · clock → HOLD · held voltage stays put for entire rest · drives VCO with a frozen melody note during pauses or section breaks
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: max

- Melody CV (Out) p> Select 2.A (SIG left)
- Clock (Out) g> Select 2.A (HOLD)
- Select 2 (A OUT) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Ring-mod via UNITY gate
patchIdeas.patch: Carrier audio → left IN · pulse modulator → UNITY · polariser at minimum · UNITY flip toggles between inverted and unity output, producing classic square-wave ring mod · knob scales depth
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: min

- VCO (Out) -> Select 2.A (SIG left)
- Modulator (Pulse) g> Select 2.A (UNITY)
- Select 2 (A OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Audio track-and-hold downsampler
patchIdeas.patch: Carrier audio → left IN · pulse wave → HOLD (audio rate) · output freezes during pulse-high · classic lo-fi/digital texture · sweep modulator pulse width to morph from subtle to full S&H
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: max

- VCO (Out) -> Select 2.A (SIG left)
- Modulator (Pulse) g> Select 2.A (HOLD)
- Select 2 (A OUT) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Variable wavemorpher
patchIdeas.patch: Sine → left IN · saw → right IN · same VCO's pulse → SELECT · output morphs between the two waveshapes per period · VCO pulse-width sweep varies the morph ratio
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: max

- VCO (Sine) -> Select 2.A (SIG left)
- VCO (Saw) -> Select 2.A (SIG right)
- VCO (Pulse) g> Select 2.A (SELECT)
- Select 2 (A OUT) -> Filter (In)

patchIdeas.name: Attenuvert + offset in one pair
patchIdeas.patch: Signal → B left IN · A polariser sets −5V to +5V offset (from +5V ref) · B polariser attenuverts the signal · A OUT unpatched so it sums into B OUT · one knob pair handles both jobs
patchIdeas.diagram:
Select 2:
* A Polariser: offset amount
* B Polariser: attenuversion

- Modulation (Out) >> Select 2.B (SIG left)
- Select 2 (B OUT) >> VCO (FM) // A OUT unpatched → sums into B
